raw_source.title: [onsite&remote] DEX is looking for QA&Testing engineer 3500U~6000U/M
raw_source.body:
## About
A ZK Orderbook Exchange for Ultimate Security and Efficiency 

### **Responsibilities:**
1. **Design and execute comprehensive test strategies** for DEX platform stability, scalability, and security.
2. **Collaborate on automated testing** to optimize coverage and efficiency.
3. **Communicate with cross-functional teams** to deliver high-quality products.
4. **Create test cases** aligned with business and technical requirements.
5. **Conduct functional and non-functional tests** to ensure system performance.
6. **Manage bug tracking and resolution** for timely product delivery.
7. **Implement automation and quality management tools** to enhance productivity.
8. **Stay updated on testing technologies** to improve team efficiency.
9. **Contribute to product design** and define testability criteria.
10. **Assess DEX performance** across networks and suggest optimizations.

### **Requirements:**
1. Bachelor's in Computer Science or related field; 3+ years QA experience, 2+ in blockchain/DEX/CEX testing
2. Proficient in automated testing tools (Selenium, Jest, etc.); blockchain knowledge and DeFi ecosystem familiarity
3. Understanding of DEX protocols; strong analytical and problem-solving skills
4. Excellent teamwork and communication; meticulous with high-quality delivery focus
5. Fluent in Chinese and English; clear technical communication skills

- Full-time or not:Full-time 
- Remote or not:Remote&onsite

## Salary and Benefits
• Competitive salary and benefits
• Flexible working hours

## Work Location
 • Global
 
## Contact
Tg: @ZzzzzzzG0
